# How Firebase Studio accelerates development

<SocialEmbed platform="youtube" id="llByU3YZvew" />

## Description

Get an exciting first look at Firebase Studio—a powerful new tool designed for interactive prototyping with Next.js and Genkit. In this video, Rody from the Firebase team shows just how quickly you can kickstart a project, using AI to instantly generate a blueprint for a tipping calculator app. With fast customization, one-click deployment, and auto-provisioning of Firebase projects and Gemini API keys, it’s never been easier to go from idea to working prototype. 

Try it for yourself → https://studio.firebase.google.com

#GoogleCloudNext #Firebase

Speaker: Rody Davis
Products Mentioned: Firebase Studio

## Transcript

**0:00** · Hi, I'm Rodie. I'm a senior developer relations engineer on the Firebase Studio team. And I'm going to give you an first look at Firebase Studio. One of the cool things that we're launching is a way to do interactive prototyping for Nex.js and Genkit. We can go in and simply say, I want to build a tipping app calculator. When we hit prototype with AI, it's going to give us a nice blueprint. This is all ready for you to try out now at studio.firebase.google.com. Check out this awesome blueprint. We can modify our features if we want. Then we can go ahead and hit prototype.

**0:30** · This is one of the things that we're really excited for you to try out. Please reach out to us if you have any feedback.

**0:38** · Super easy to share. You can have some awesome ways to get into the code. We have oneclick publish to even Firebase app hosting. If there's any features that need a Gemini API key, we'll even autoprovision a Firebase project and Gemini API key for you. So it looks like we just generated really quickly. This is all live and no edits. Say God.

**1:00** · Thanks for watching.

**1:02** · \[Music\]
